manifest.name: Word (By Anthropic)
manifest.description: Control Microsoft Word with AppleScript automation
manifest.long_description:
This extension allows Claude to interact with Microsoft Word on macOS, enabling document creation, editing, formatting, and management.

It uses macOS AppleScript automation to control Word and requires your explicit permission through macOS security prompts before accessing Microsoft Word. It is not affiliated with or endorsed by Microsoft Corporation.

tools.name: create_document
tools.description: Create a new Word document with optional content

tools.name: open_document
tools.description: Open an existing Word document

tools.name: get_document_text
tools.description: Get all text content from the active document

tools.name: insert_text
tools.description: Insert text at the current cursor position

tools.name: replace_text
tools.description: Find and replace text in the active document

tools.name: format_text
tools.description: Apply formatting to selected text (bold, italic, underline, font, size, color)

tools.name: save_document
tools.description: Save the active document

tools.name: close_document
tools.description: Close the active document

tools.name: export_pdf
tools.description: Export the active document as PDF

manifest.name: PowerPoint (By Anthropic)
manifest.description: Control Microsoft PowerPoint with AppleScript automation
manifest.long_description:
This extension allows Claude to interact with Microsoft PowerPoint on macOS, enabling presentation creation, slide management, and content editing.

It uses macOS AppleScript automation to control PowerPoint and requires your explicit permission through macOS security prompts before accessing Microsoft PowerPoint. It is not affiliated with or endorsed by Microsoft Corporation.

tools.name: create_presentation
tools.description: Create a new PowerPoint presentation

tools.name: open_presentation
tools.description: Open an existing PowerPoint presentation

tools.name: add_slide
tools.description: Add a new slide to the presentation

tools.name: get_slide_content
tools.description: Get the text content from a specific slide

tools.name: set_slide_title
tools.description: Set the title of a slide

tools.name: add_text_to_slide
tools.description: Add text content to a slide

tools.name: insert_image
tools.description: Insert an image into a slide

tools.name: delete_slide
tools.description: Delete a specific slide

tools.name: save_presentation
tools.description: Save the active presentation

tools.name: close_presentation
tools.description: Close the active presentation

tools.name: export_pdf
tools.description: Export the presentation as PDF
